important_error_examples: The model labelled hypertension from evidence 'BP 90/60', illustrating that verbatim evidence can still be clinically non-supportive.
Four extracted items failed the exact-verbatim evidence check because the returned evidence text was altered/combined rather than copied exactly.
open_ended_llm.interpretation: The extraction/evidence contract is mostly operational, but exact-substring evidence is not sufficient to establish clinical support. Keyword-vs-LLM disagreement is not an accuracy metric because NHSE Silver has no clinician phenotype gold and the keyword dictionary is deliberately narrow.

provenance.note: NHSE and Synthea outputs completed before a later CodiEsp indexing bug stopped the combined runner; CodiEsp was rerun successfully in a corrected standalone workflow.

synthea_known_missingness_c4.main_conclusion: The C4 evaluator correctly recovers 100% of injected missing positives with an oracle text channel. With an apparently strong 85%-sensitive, 2%-FPR text detector, recovery sensitivity remains around 81-85% but PPV among Text+/Structured- is only 33-69% depending on missingness prevalence. This demonstrates the base-rate problem and why a strict PPV/evidence gate is necessary before calling additional AI findings recoverable under-recording.
synthea_known_missingness_c4.interpretation: Controlled methods validation only; injected missingness is not an estimate of real clinical under-recording.

codiesp_clinical_text_to_icd10.main_conclusion: CodiEsp is a valid external Clinical text -> ICD-10 gold benchmark, but the first MedCode retrieval/candidate-assisted configuration is weak. DeepSeek increased precision on the fixed 50-case subset but reduced recall enough to underperform the same-subset TF-IDF baseline in F1. The dominant bottleneck is candidate generation: Top-20 recall is only about 31-33%, so most gold codes are unavailable to a candidate-constrained reranker.
codiesp_clinical_text_to_icd10.next_methodological_upgrade: Use the official CodiEsp diagnosis-code resource with English ICD-10 descriptions to build description-aware/hybrid retrieval, then rerun candidate recall and LLM selection. CodiEsp-X can additionally test evidence-span grounding.
